description_long: This temple is a rectangular, classical structure elevated on a stone platform, featuring a colonnade of tall, fluted columns with ornate capitals along its perimeter. The roof is steeply pitched and covered with reddish-brown tiles, adorned at the ridges and corners with golden sculptural ornaments resembling acroteria. The pediments at both ends display painted or sculpted scenes, with the front pediment showing a central figure surrounded by architectural detailing. The entablature above the columns is richly decorated with horizontal bands in shades of gold and brown, adding to the grandeur. The stone base is robust and slightly weathered, with subtle color variations and block patterns. The overall appearance is monumental, with a harmonious blend of stone, terracotta, and gilded decorative elements.
description: A grand, rectangular classical temple with fluted columns, a tiled gable roof, and golden ornaments at the roof corners. The structure features detailed pediments and a richly decorated entablature atop a stone platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a row of columns, a detailed pediment with central artwork, and golden roof ornaments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long colonnade, the full length of the tiled roof, and the stone platform base.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar pediment to the front, visible artwork, and symmetrical golden roof ornaments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the colonnade and the length of the roof and base.
attribute_ornamentation: moderate density of sculpted and painted pediments, fluted columns, gold acroteria, and horizontal decorative bands
attribute_entrance_design: columned portico with a wide rectangular opening, framed by fluted columns and topped with a decorated pediment
